hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: We would love to hear from you

darshan.heading: GURU JI DARSHAN
darshan.description: We warmly invite all members of GuruJi's Sangat, as well as those with a curious heart, to join us in our gatherings. Come and experience the grace of GuruJi's omniscient Kripa, and receive his blessings as we walk this spiritual path together.

info.address: Caxton Village Hall, Caxton, Cambridge CB23 3PL
info.timings: Venue is open between 13:00 - 19:00 on Satsang Days
